name: CINEMÉ — Movie Finder
description: Search and discover movies instantly. Powered by OMDB.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src * data:; connect-src https://www.omdbapi.com https://via.placeholder.com
